title: Senior Fleet Manager at Om Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Om Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
